features.featureTitle: Save the uploaded Growth Byte Digital logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png (overwriting any existing file), then fix all components that reference this logo (Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AboutSection.tsx) so the image renders correctly. Ensure the src attribute uses the correct relative public path '/assets/generated/logo.png', the alt attribute is set to 'Growth Byte Digital', the image has explicit height/width constraints appropriate for each context (height 48px in Navbar, height 60px in Footer, larger display size in HeroSection and AboutSection), and object-fit is set to 'contain' so the logo is never cropped or distorted.
